description.p: 3 cores, 1 body, you have different forms with separate powers.

sheet.description: 3 cores, 1 body, you have different forms with separate powers.

description.p: Starting at 1st level, your cursed energy is gathered into a single core. As a bonus action, you can choose to enter a secondary form giving you access to a special ability for 1 minute. You gain one core option at this level:

ul.li: Unblockable Blows: When you hit with a melee attack, you can spend 1 CE to ignore resistances. If the creature is not resistant, they are considered vulnerable.

Energy Blast: As an action you spend CE up to your CE modifier to launch a blast of cursed energy. You make a ranged cursed energy attack against a target within 80 feet dealing 2d6 necrotic damage for each CE.

Defensive Form: As a bonus action, you assume this form for 1 minute, buffing your defense. You gain a number of temporary hit points equal to twice your current cursed energy. You can spend 1 CE at the beginning of your turn to refresh the temporary hit points.

Divebomb: As part of the bonus action you take to enter this form, you spend CE up to your CE modifier. For the duration of this form, your speed increases by 10 ft per CE spent and you gain a +2 bonus to AC. You deal an additional 1d4 damage for every 15 ft you move in a straight line before hitting a target with a melee attack.

sheet.description: Activate a core option for 1 minute, giving you a special ability. You can only have one core option active at a time.

description.p: When you hit with a melee attack, you can spend 1 CE to ignore resistances. If the creature is not resistant, they are considered vulnerable.

sheet.description: When you hit with a melee attack, you can spend 1 CE to ignore resistances. If the creature is not resistant, they are considered vulnerable.

description.p: As an action you spend CE up to your CE modifier to launch a blast of cursed energy. You make a ranged cursed energy attack against a target within 80 feet dealing 2d6 necrotic damage for each CE.

sheet.description: For up to {{ce:modifier}} CE, make a ranged CE attack against a target within 80 feet dealing 2d6 necrotic damage for each CE spent.

description.p: As a bonus action, you assume this form for 1 minute, buffing your defense. You gain a number of temporary hit points equal to twice your current cursed energy. You can spend 1 CE at the beginning of your turn to refresh the temporary hit points.

sheet.description: For 1 minute, gain a number of temporary hit points equal to twice your current cursed energy. You can spend 1 CE at the beginning of your turn to refresh the temporary hit points.

description.p: As part of the bonus action you take to enter this form, you spend CE up to your CE modifier. For the duration of this form, your speed increases by 10 ft per CE spent and you gain a +2 bonus to AC. You deal an additional 1d4 damage for every 15 ft you move in a straight line before hitting a target with a melee attack.

sheet.description: As part of the bonus action you take to enter this form, spent up to {{ce:modifier}} CE. For the duration of this form, your speed increases by 10 ft per CE spent and you gain a +2 bonus to AC. You deal an additional 1d4 damage for every 15 ft you move in a straight line before hitting a target with a melee attack.

description.p: At 3rd level, you can choose two more core options. You can only have one core option active at a time.
At 6th level, you have learned to specialize in one of your forms, allowing it to become semi-permanent. Choose one of your core options you have access to and gain its upgraded option:

ul.li: Unblockable Blows: Your strikes are imbued with unblockable power. Once per turn when you miss with a melee attack, you still deal damage equal to your Strength or Dexterity modifier.

Energy Blast: Your cursed energy has become far more destructive. Once per turn when you deal damage with a ranged cursed energy attack, you add your Cursed Energy modifier to the damage roll. If you already add your modifier to the roll, you add it a second time.
Defensive Form: Your body passively reinforces itself with cursed energy. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by your Cursed Energy modifier + your proficiency bonus.
Divebomb: Your body has adapted to improve its swiftness. You can spend 1 ce to take the dash, disengage, or dodge action as a bonus action.

description.p: Your upgraded options are always active even when you haven't entered a core form. Though you can not benefit from an upgraded option while in a different core option's form. You can gain an additional upgraded option at 11th and 18th level.

sheet.description: Your upgraded options are always active even when you haven't entered a core form, but you can not benefit from an upgraded option while in a different core option's form.

description.p: Your strikes are imbued with unblockable power. Once per turn when you miss with a melee attack, you still deal damage equal to your Strength or Dexterity modifier.

sheet.description: Once per turn when you miss with a melee attack, you still deal {{triple:core:unblockable:blows:damage}} damage.

description.p: Your cursed energy has become far more destructive. Once per turn when you deal damage with a ranged cursed energy attack, you add your Cursed Energy modifier to the damage roll. If you already add your modifier to the roll, you add it a second time.

sheet.description: Once per turn when you deal damage with a ranged CE attack, add {{ce:modifier}} to the damage roll.

description.p: Your body passively reinforces itself with cursed energy. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by your Cursed Energy modifier + your proficiency bonus.
Your body has adapted to improve its swiftness. You can spend 1 ce to take the dash, disengage, or dodge action as a bonus action.

sheet.description: For 1 CE, take the dash, disengage, or dodge action.

description.p: Starting at 11th level, when you would be reduced to 0 hit points, you can choose to lose access to one of your core forms for 1 week to return to half your maximum HP.

sheet.description: When you would be reduced to 0 hit points, you can choose to lose access to one of your core forms for 1 week to return to half your maximum HP.

description.p: At 18th level, you gain true understanding over your cores. When inside your domain, you are under the effect of all three cores.

sheet.description: When inside your domain, you are under the effect of all three cores.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Rule of Three Replacement
